title: test-exec-web-e2e request envelope
description: Request envelope for ADR-035-aligned web E2E execution. The request references a formal TESTSET that carries requirement-driven case expansion intent, while optional UI source refs enrich resolution without replacing the TESTSET.

test_set_ref.description: Formal TESTSET ref emitted by ll-qa-feat-to-testset. The resolved TESTSET should expose functional_areas, logic_dimensions, state_model, coverage_matrix, and traceable test_units.

frontend_code_ref.description: Optional web source enrichment ref for frontend codebase resolution.

ui_runtime_ref.description: Optional web source enrichment ref for runtime pages or deployed UI sources.

ui_source_spec.description: Optional web-specific UI source context. It can complement the TESTSET, but it does not replace the TESTSET contract.
